name: submit_dialogue_options
description: Submit the generated dialogue options for the player.

stat.description: The stat used for this option. Must be one of: Charm, Rizz, Honesty, Chaos, Wit, SelfAwareness

text.description: The dialogue text for this option.

callback.description: Callback turn reference (e.g. '3' or 'turn_3') or null if none.

combo.description: Combo name being completed, or null if none.
